title: Draw a Ship
prompt: Draw a ship and describe it in English.
hint: Use simple sentences like 'I can draw a ship.' and 'This is my ship.'
sample: I can draw a ship. This is my ship.

ja.prompt: 船を描いて、英語で説明してください。
ja.hint: 'I can draw a ship.'や'This is my ship.'のような簡単な文を使いましょう。
ja.sample: I can draw a ship. This is my ship.

zh.prompt: 畫一艘船並用英文描述它。
zh.hint: 使用簡單句子，例如 'I can draw a ship.' 和 'This is my ship.'
zh.sample: I can draw a ship. This is my ship.
